tools.name: casa_pricing
tools.description: Return Casa's pricing, payment, durability and privacy model. No args. Use this first to learn how storing works and what the privacy trade-offs are.

tools.name: casa_store
tools.description: Store bytes on Casa (Swarm). Costs $0.01 in USDC via x402. PRIVACY: pass `encrypted_blob` (base64 of a Casa envelope you sealed locally) to stay zero-knowledge — PREFERRED. If you pass plaintext (`text` or `content_base64`) instead, the server sees it and the response will carry encrypted:false. PAY

tools.name: casa_retrieve
tools.description: Fetch the RAW stored bytes for a reference (free). Returns base64. If you stored an encrypted envelope, these bytes are ciphertext — decrypt locally with your wallet key (the hosted server has no key and cannot decrypt). For automatic decryption use the local `casa-mcp` stdio server.

tools.name: casa_info
tools.description: Return metadata Casa recorded for a reference: name, size, content type, created_at, encrypted flag, durability and the public Swarm gateway URL. Note: only references stored through THIS Casa instance have recorded metadata; otherwise just the gateway URL is returned.
